cmd:
pkg-config --validate glib-2.0
test "$(pkg-config --modversion glib-2.0)" = "2.80.0"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=prefix glib-2.0)" = "/usr/local"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=datadir glib-2.0)" = "/usr/local/share"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=gobject_query glib-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/gobject-query"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=glib_mkenums glib-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/glib-mkenums"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=glib_valgrind_suppressions glib-2.0)" = "/usr/local/share/glib-2.0/valgrind/glib.supp"
name: glib-2.0-pkg-config

cmd:
pkg-config --validate gthread-2.0
test "$(pkg-config --modversion gthread-2.0)" = "2.80.0"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=prefix gthread-2.0)" = "/usr/local"
name: gthread-2.0-pkg-config

cmd:
pkg-config --validate gmodule-no-export-2.0
test "$(pkg-config --modversion gmodule-no-export-2.0)" = "2.80.0"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=prefix gmodule-no-export-2.0)" = "/usr/local"
name: gmodule-no-export-2.0-pkg-config

cmd:
pkg-config --validate gmodule-export-2.0
test "$(pkg-config --modversion gmodule-export-2.0)" = "2.80.0"

name: gmodule-export-2.0-pkg-config

cmd:
pkg-config --validate gmodule-2.0
test "$(pkg-config --modversion gmodule-2.0)" = "2.80.0"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=prefix gmodule-2.0)" = "/usr/local"
name: gmodule-2.0-pkg-config

cmd:
pkg-config --validate gio-2.0
test "$(pkg-config --modversion gio-2.0)" = "2.80.0"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=prefix gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=datadir gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/share"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=schemasdir gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/share/glib-2.0/schemas"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=giomoduledir gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/gio/modules"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=gio gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/gio"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=glib_compile_resources gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/glib-compile-resources"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=gdbus gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/gdbus"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=gdbus_codegen gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/gdbus-codegen"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=gresource gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/gresource"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=gsettings gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/gsettings"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=gio_querymodules gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/gio-querymodules"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=glib_compile_schemas gio-2.0)" = "/usr/local/bin/glib-compile-schemas"
name: gio-2.0-pkg-config

cmd:
pkg-config --validate gio-unix-2.0
test "$(pkg-config --modversion gio-unix-2.0)" = "2.80.0"
test "$(pkg-config --variable=prefix gio-unix-2.0)" = "/usr/local"
name: gio-unix-2.0-pkg-config
